info.title: Wavy Backoffice Private API
info.description: Reverse-engineered documentation of api.wavy.fr. This is an unofficial reference — endpoints, schemas, and behaviour may change without notice.
info.x-organisation-note: Ce fichier monolithique (>260 Ko) documente 43 routes et 49 schémas. Découpage recommandé par microservice : openapi-auth.json, openapi-clients.json, openapi-visits.json, openapi-planning.json, openapi-finances.json, openapi-stock.json, openapi-marketing.json, openapi-treatwell.json, openapi-billing.json, openapi-loyalty.json, openapi-shared.json (composants réutilisables). Utiliser un bundler (ex. : swagger-cli bundle) pour générer le fichier distribué.
info.x-curl-test: GET /shops/{shopID}/items?itemType=package confirmed 200 — package schema with embedded services and PackageItemPrice. GET /shops/{shopID}/discounts confirmed 200. GET /users confirmed 200. GET /v2/treatwell/{shopID}/v1/settings confirmed 200. GET /v2/marketing/{shopID}/v1/sms-campaigns confirmed 200. GET /v2/marketing/{shopID}/v1/sms-campaigns/{id}/roi confirmed 200. POST /v2/auth/v1/st/signin confirmed 200 — returns status+user with SuperTokens UUID. GET /v2/auth/v1/users/me confirmed 200 — full user profile with shops array. GET /shops/{shopID}/staffs confirmed 200 — flattened staff+membership view with 2 members. GET /v2/planning/{shopID}/v1/days confirmed 200 — PlanningDay array with 42 visits (APPOINTMENT/PAID/CANCELED) confirmed. GET /v2/finances/{shopID}/v1/closures/today confirmed 200 — OPEN closure, amounts empty. GET /v2/core/{shopID}/v1/items/colors confirmed 200 — array of {_id, color} with named colours (purple, cherry) or null. GET /v2/core/{shopID}/v1/clients confirmed 200 — paginated {rows, page, pageSize, total, totalPages} envelope with 5530 clients. GET /shops/{shopID}/loyalty confirmed 200 — 4 loyalty programs (jackpot+giftCard). GET /shops/{shopID}/visits confirmed 200 — Visit array filtered by client._id with $sort. GET /shops/{shopID}/credits confirmed 200 — Credit array for a client. GET /v2/core/{shopID}/v1/clients/{clientID} confirmed 200 — single projected Client. GET /v2/stock/{shopID}/v1/products/list 401 (token expired — schema TBD). GET /v2/stock/{shopID}/v1/products/{productId} confirmed 200 — full product with computedStock, barcode, taxRate. GET /v2/stock/{shopID}/v1/stockIOs/past-purchase-prices confirmed 200 — [{at, price}] or [].

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description:
Session and CSRF token management, backed by SuperTokens (FDI 1.8–1.10).

**Three cookies, rotating on every refresh:**
- `sAccessToken` — short-lived JWT (~1h lifetime). Sent on every authenticated request.
- `sRefreshToken` — single-use refresh token. Only sent to `/v2/auth/v1/st/session/refresh` (cookie Path is restricted to that endpoint).
- `sIdRefreshToken` — opaque session identifier cookie.

**Two rid header values:**
- `rid: anti-csrf` on all resource endpoints (items, clients, shops, …).
- `rid: session` on `/v2/auth/v1/st/session/refresh` only.

**JWT payload** (base64-decode the middle segment of `sAccessToken`):
```
{
  sessionHandle, userId,            // SuperTokens session + user UUID
  refreshTokenHash1,                // hash of the current refresh token
  parentRefreshTokenHash1,          // hash of the *previous* refresh token (present only after the first refresh)
  userData: { deviceUserID, userID, userMode },
  expiryTime, timeCreated, lmrt
}
```

**Refresh flow & rotation chain:**
1. Resource endpoint returns `401 { message: 'try refresh token' }` when the access token is expired.
2. Client POSTs `/v2/auth/v1/st/session/refresh` with the `sRefreshToken` cookie and `rid: session`.
3. Server rotates all three cookies via `Set-Cookie`, returns the new id-refresh-token in the response header, and the new access token JWT carries the old token's hash as `parentRefreshTokenHash1`.

**Token theft detection.** Each refresh token can be consumed exactly once. On refresh, SuperTokens checks whether the presented token is (a) the current one, or (b) the parent of the current one (expected replay of the previous rotation). If neither, the server assumes the token was stolen and replayed after the legitimate client already rotated: it returns `401 { message: 'token theft detected' }`, clears all three cookies with `Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT`, and revokes the session server-side. The `parentRefreshTokenHash1` field is how the chain is tracked.

tags.name: Background Tasks
tags.description: Background job tracking for billing, SMS campaigns, and other async operations scoped under a shop. Supports pagination and sorting.

tags.name: Clients
tags.description: Salon clients scoped under a shop. Same data as /customers, different path convention. Returns the full client list in a single unpaginated array.

tags.name: Items
tags.description: Services and products scoped under a shop. Supports FeathersJS Mongo-style query operators in query params (e.g. type[$ne]=gift-card).

tags.name: Shops
tags.description: The authenticated salon's shop document — identity, subscription, settings, stats, roles, and feature flags.

tags.name: Online Booking
tags.description: Widget settings for the public online booking interface. Paths use the /v2/v1/online-booking/ prefix — a Moleculer microservice with nested versioning.

tags.name: Marketing
tags.description: Marketing integrations and configurations. Facebook Business Extension, SMS campaigns, and other third-party marketing tools. Routes through /v2/marketing Moleculer microservice.

tags.name: Brands
tags.description: Global product brand catalogue shared across all shops. Returns a flat array of all known brands (3 550+ entries). Not scoped to a specific shop — the token only needs to be valid.

tags.name: Discounts
tags.description: Reusable discount definitions scoped to a shop. Applied at checkout — either a fixed amount (absolute) or a percentage. applicableTo is an empty array when the discount applies to all items.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Staff user accounts scoped to the session's shop. Returns all staff members with their schedule, role, and SuperTokens identity links.

tags.name: Treatwell
tags.description: Treatwell marketplace integration settings for a shop. Routes through /v2/treatwell/{shopID}/v1/ Moleculer microservice. Contains sync state, listing URL, and widget modal tracking.

tags.name: Stats
tags.description: Statistics export endpoint. Accepts a POST with a date range and returns an async export job identifier. The export covers visits, revenue, and client activity.

tags.name: Finances
tags.description: Daily cash register closures (caisse) for a shop. Routes through the /v2/finances/{shopID}/v1/ Moleculer microservice. A closure record is created each day and can be OPEN (in progress) or CLOSED (end-of-day summary with payment breakdown).

tags.name: Planning
tags.description: Day-by-day planning view for a shop. Routes through the /v2/planning/{shopID}/v1/ Moleculer microservice. Returns visits (confirmed/paid/cancelled appointments), recurring visit instances, and leaves grouped by day.

tags.name: Visits
tags.description: Salon visit records — past, present (appointments), and cancelled. Routes through the /v2/core/{shopID}/v1/ Moleculer microservice. Each visit embeds a full client snapshot, appointment metadata, payment record, and enriched line items. Statuses: APPOINTMENT (upcoming), PENDING (in-chair / payment pending), PAID, CANCELED.

tags.name: Core
tags.description: Core microservice for shop-specific catalogue operations. Routes through /v2/core/{shopID}/v1/. Provides lightweight projection endpoints complementing the main FeathersJS service routes.

tags.name: Credits
tags.description: Loyalty credits and gift cards issued to clients. Each record tracks an original amount, remaining balance, expiry, and full usage history. Backed by the FeathersJS `/shops/{shopID}/credits` resource. Supports `deleted[$ne]` and dot-notation MongoDB filters.

tags.name: Loyalty
tags.description: Définitions des programmes de fidélité d'un salon — catalogue des programmes (cagnotte progressive, cartes cadeaux) qui génèrent les enregistrements Credit. En général 2 à 5 entrées par salon.

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Wavy platform subscription invoices for the shop. Routes through the `/v2/billing/{shopID}/v1/` Moleculer microservice. Invoices are issued by Zuora (Wavy's billing provider). Returns an unpaginated flat list.

tags.name: Stock
tags.description: Physical stock management for retail products in a shop. Routes through the /v2/stock/{shopID}/v1/ Moleculer microservice. Tracks inventory levels (computedStock), barcodes, categories, prices, and purchase history.

antiCsrf.name: rid
antiCsrf.description: Must be the literal string anti-csrf

_id.description: MongoDB ObjectID — present when the slot is stored as a subdocument (e.g. GET /shops/{shopID}/staffs). Absent in projection-based responses.

Price.description: Niveau de tarification d'un service ou produit (ex. : Adulte, Junior, Senior).

name.description: Libellé du niveau tarifaire (ex. : Adulte, Junior)

value.description: Prix TTC dans la devise du salon

ClientStats.description: Statistiques agrégées d'un client calculées à partir de ses visites payées.

totalSpent.description: Montant total dépensé par le client depuis son inscription (dans la devise du salon)

lastVisitIsNoShow.description: Vrai si la dernière visite était un no-show

isProfilePicture.description: Vrai si cette image est la photo de profil principale du client

FacebookAuth.description: Identité Facebook liée au compte client.

userID.description: Identifiant utilisateur Facebook (null si non lié)

accessToken.description: Jeton d'accès Facebook (null si révoqué ou non lié)

userID.description: Google numeric user ID as string

country.description: Code pays ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 du pays d'émission de la carte

shopID.description: Identifiant UUID du salon auquel appartient ce client

email.description: Adresse e-mail du client (null si non renseignée)

telephone.description: Numéro de téléphone au format E.164 (ex. : +33612345678)

gender.description: Genre du client (male = homme, female = femme)

age.description: Tranche d'âge du client (adult = adulte, junior = enfant/adolescent, senior = senior)

notes.description: Notes internes libres saisies par le salon sur ce client

address.description: Adresse complète du client (champ libre, peut inclure la rue et la ville)

street.description: Rue et numéro de voie du client

countryCode.description: Code pays ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (ex. : FR, BE)

onlineBooking.description: Vrai si le client a déjà réservé via le widget de réservation en ligne

rgpdChecked.description: Vrai si le client a accepté la politique de confidentialité RGPD

marketingConsent.description: Vrai si le client a consenti à recevoir des communications marketing (SMS, e-mail)

shortLinkCode.description: Code court unique utilisé dans les liens de partage client (ex. : lien d'avis Google)

shopID.description: Identifiant UUID du salon propriétaire de ce service/produit

itemType.description: Type d'article : service (prestation), product (produit revendu), package (forfait combinant plusieurs services)

type.description: Sous-type du service. Valeurs observées : haircut, trimmer, shave, shampoo, styling, colouring, shaping, other-hair, other

title.description: Nom complet de l'article affiché en backoffice et dans la réservation en ligne

shortTitle.description: Abbreviated label shown in compact UI views

titleRwG.description: Title override for Google Reserve with Google integration

category.description: Catégorie de l'article (ex. : Coupe, Coloration, Soin)

description.description: Description longue de l'article visible dans la réservation en ligne

duration.description: Durée de la prestation en minutes

prices.description: One entry per price tier. Empty array means price is set at booking time.

allowedTypes.description: Customer type restrictions (e.g. male, female, junior). Empty means no restriction.

products.description: IDs of products consumed by this service

items.description: For itemType=package: fully embedded service objects with package-adjusted pricing (PackageItem). For service/product: always an empty array.

color.description: Calendar display color for the item (e.g. 'cherry', 'purple'). Only set on some packages.

showOnWebsite.description: Affiché sur le site web/widget de réservation en ligne du salon

onlineBooking.description: Réservable via le widget de réservation en ligne Wavy

onlineBookingRwg.description: Bookable via Google Reserve with Google

isFavorite.description: Vrai si l'article est épinglé en favori dans le backoffice

tags.description: Étiquettes libres associées à l'article pour la recherche et le filtrage

picturesCPID.description: Chemins Cloudinary des photos de l'article

updatedAt.description: Date de dernière modification de l'article (ISO 8601)

StaffUser.description: Compte utilisateur d'un membre du personnel — projection légère retournée dans les réponses d'authentification.

lastName.description: Nom de famille du membre du personnel

ShopLegal.description: Informations légales et fiscales du salon.

currency.description: Code devise ISO 4217 utilisé par le salon (ex. : EUR)

vat.description: Taux de TVA par défaut du salon en pourcentage (ex. : 20)

siret.description: Numéro SIRET de l'établissement (14 chiffres, France uniquement)

telephone.description: Numéro de téléphone du salon au format E.164

SubscriptionPlan.description: Détails d'un abonnement Wavy actif pour un salon (POS ou Marketing).

maxStaffs.description: Nombre maximum de membres du personnel inclus dans ce plan

ShopStats.description: Statistiques agrégées du salon calculées sur l'ensemble de son historique.

totalClients.description: Nombre total de fiches clients créées dans le salon

totalVisits.description: Nombre total de visites enregistrées (toutes statuts confondus)

totalOnlineBookings.description: Nombre total de réservations effectuées via le widget en ligne

monthlyRevenue.description: Chiffre d'affaires du mois en cours dans la devise du salon

lastVisit.description: Date et heure de la dernière visite enregistrée dans le salon (ISO 8601)

phoneCountryCode.description: Indicatif téléphonique du pays du salon (ex. : +33 pour la France)

status.description: Statut du compte salon : PENDING = en cours d'activation, ACTIVE = opérationnel

stage.description: Étape du cycle de vie : LIVE = salon en production, ONBOARDING = configuration initiale en cours

homeService.description: Vrai si le salon propose des prestations à domicile

subscription.description: Abonnements Wavy actifs du salon, séparés par module

pos.description: Abonnement au module caisse / point de vente

featureFlags.description: Indicateurs d'activation de fonctionnalités expérimentales ou spécifiques au salon (clé = nom du flag, valeur = activé/désactivé)

schedule.description: Horaires d'ouverture du salon par jour de la semaine

createdAt.description: Date de création du compte salon (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Date de dernière modification du document salon (ISO 8601)

BackgroundTask.description: A background task record for billing or other async operations

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created

expireAt.description: Timestamp when the task record expires

shopID.description: UUID of the shop this task belongs to

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated

UnbilledStats.description: Statistics for items that could not be billed

invalidType.description: Count of items with invalid type

noZuoraAccount.description: Count of items without Zuora account

unknownError.description: Count of items with unknown error

accountingPeriodClosed.description: Count of items in closed accounting period

zuoraUsageUpdateError.description: Count of Zuora usage update errors

total.description: Total number of items to process

Brand.description: A product brand in the Wavy global catalogue

_id.description: Slug identifier (e.g. loreal, kerastase). Not a UUID or ObjectID.

logoCPID.description: Cloudinary path for the brand logo (e.g. brands/loreal.jpg)

brandPage.description: Optional partner-badge configuration shown in the backoffice

badgeLink.description: URL for the partner badge (e.g. share.wavy.co/loreal-partner-shop)

badgeText.description: Label displayed on the partner badge

createdAt.description: Date de création de la marque (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Date de dernière modification de la marque (ISO 8601)

PackageItemPrice.description: Package-adjusted price for one service component inside a package. `value` is the price charged within the package; `coeff` is value / standalone list price.

_id.description: MongoDB ObjectID (copied from the canonical Price entry)

name.description: Libellé du niveau tarifaire (ex. : Adulte, Senior)

value.description: Prix ajusté dans le contexte du forfait (en unités de devise)

coeff.description: Coefficient : prix forfait / prix autonome. Ex. : 0,5 = facturé à moitié du tarif normal

PackageItem.description: A service record embedded inside a package (itemType=package). Contains all standard service fields plus `price` (the package-adjusted pricing) and `serviceID` (pointer to the canonical service document). The `items` array on PackageItem is always empty.

__v.description: Clé de version du document Mongoose

itemType.description: Toujours 'service' pour un article intégré dans un forfait

shopID.description: Identifiant UUID du salon propriétaire du service

serviceID.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the canonical service document. Only present on embedded copies, not on the canonical record itself.

title.description: Nom du service intégré dans le forfait

duration.description: Durée en minutes (remplacée par la durée du créneau dans le forfait)

taxRate.description: Taux de TVA applicable au service en pourcentage

prices.description: Grille tarifaire autonome du service (hors prix forfait)

price.description: Prix ajusté du service dans le contexte du forfait

allowedTypes.description: Types de clientèle autorisés pour ce service (vide = aucune restriction)

products.description: ObjectIDs des produits consommés lors de la réalisation de ce service

items.description: Toujours vide pour les services intégrés dans un forfait

showOnWebsite.description: Affiché sur le site web / widget de réservation en ligne

tags.description: Étiquettes libres associées au service

picturesCPID.description: Chemins Cloudinary des photos du service

updatedAt.description: Date de dernière modification du service (ISO 8601)

Discount.description: A reusable discount definition applied at checkout. type=absolute subtracts a fixed amount; type=percentage subtracts a percentage.

type.description: absolute = fixed currency amount; percentage = 0–100 percent off

value.description: Discount amount. Currency units for absolute; 0–100 for percentage.

applicableTo.description: Item ObjectIDs this discount is restricted to. Empty array means applicable to all items.

currentTries.description: Number of consecutive failed login attempts

passwordUsageCount.description: Total number of times the user has logged in

UserDocument.description: Full staff user document as returned by GET /users. Includes shop memberships, schedule, and SuperTokens identity links.

lastName.description: Nom de famille du membre du personnel

telephone.description: Numéro de téléphone au format E.164

code.description: Code PIN à 4 chiffres du membre du personnel

isInit.description: Vrai si le compte a terminé sa configuration initiale

superAdminRights.description: Droits super-administrateur attribués à cet utilisateur (généralement vide)

supertokensUsers.description: UUIDs SuperTokens liés à ce compte personnel

shopID.description: Identifiant UUID du salon de cette adhésion

name.description: Nom du salon (copie du champ ShopDocument.name)

role.description: Rôle du personnel dans ce salon : owner = gérant, manager = responsable, collaborator = prestataire

schedule.description: Horaires de travail de ce membre du personnel dans ce salon

customSchedule.description: Vrai si ce membre a des horaires personnalisés différents du salon

onlineBooking.description: Vrai si ce membre est proposé à la réservation en ligne

showOnWebsite.description: Vrai si ce membre apparaît sur le site web du salon

profilePictureCPID.description: Chemin Cloudinary de la photo de profil du membre dans ce salon

allowedTypologies.description: Types de clientèle que ce membre peut prendre en charge (vide = aucune restriction)

TreatwellSettings.description: Treatwell marketplace integration state for a shop. Tracks sync status, listing URL, modal interaction history, and welcome kit progress.

firstModalDismissDate.description: Date à laquelle la modale Treatwell a été fermée pour la première fois

modalDismissCount.description: Nombre de fois que la modale Treatwell a été fermée

modalDismissDate.description: Date de la dernière fermeture de la modale Treatwell

status.description: Statut de l'intégration Treatwell (ex. : active, inactive)

lastAvailabilitySyncDate.description: Last time the shop's availability was synced to Treatwell

purchasable.description: Vrai si le salon est actuellement vendable sur Treatwell

purchasableSince.description: Date depuis laquelle le salon est vendable sur Treatwell

lastUpdate.description: Date de la dernière mise à jour du kit de bienvenue

showCounter.description: Nombre de fois que le kit de bienvenue a été affiché

status.description: Statut du kit de bienvenue (ex. : DISMISSED = fermé par l'utilisateur)

SmsCampaignFilters.description: Client targeting filters for an SMS campaign. All demographic booleans default to false (meaning no restriction on that attribute).

birthMonths.description: 1-based month numbers to target clients with birthdays in those months. null means no filter.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes to target

female.description: Cibler les clients de genre féminin

male.description: Cibler les clients de genre masculin

SmsCampaignRoi.description: Return-on-investment metrics for an SMS campaign. Populated after the campaign closes (closed=true).

closed.description: Whether the ROI measurement window has closed

cost.description: Total SMS send cost in currency units

SmsCampaign.description: An SMS marketing campaign. Contains the targeting filters, message content, send state, billing, and inline ROI summary.

title.description: Titre interne de la campagne SMS (non visible par les destinataires)

message.description: Contenu du SMS envoyé aux destinataires

sender.description: Sender name shown on the recipient's handset (max 11 chars)

blackList.description: Client ObjectIDs explicitly excluded from this campaign

recipientsClientID.description: Client ObjectIDs that matched the filters at send time

isClientValidated.description: Whether the recipient list was validated before sending

isTemplate.description: Whether this campaign is saved as a reusable template

maxChars.description: Maximum character count per SMS part (typically 160)

maxSMS.description: Number of SMS parts required for the message

readyToSend.description: Vrai si la campagne a été validée et est prête à être envoyée

sent.description: Vrai si la campagne a déjà été envoyée

sentAt.description: Date et heure d'envoi de la campagne (null si pas encore envoyée)

billPrice.description: Total billed amount for this campaign in currency units

createdAt.description: Date de création de la campagne (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Date de dernière modification de la campagne (ISO 8601)

Leave.description: A staff time-off or absence record. type='staff' means a specific staff member is unavailable. The endpoint returns all leaves for the shop (480+ records in production). Supports ETag/304 caching.

shopID.description: Identifiant UUID du salon auquel appartient cette absence

type.description: Portée de l'absence : 'staff' = absence individuelle d'un membre du personnel

reverse.description: Whether this record reverses/cancels a previous leave

startDate.description: Date et heure de début de l'absence (ISO 8601)

endDate.description: Date et heure de fin de l'absence (ISO 8601)

cause.description: Motif de l'absence (texte libre, peut être vide)

staff.description: Référence partielle du membre du personnel concerné

_id.description: MongoDB ObjectID du membre du personnel

lastName.description: Nom de famille du membre du personnel

updatedAt.description: Date de dernière modification de l'absence (ISO 8601)

total.description: Total number of tasks across all pages

StaffMember.description: Membre du personnel avec les champs d'adhésion au salon aplatis sur le document. Retourné par GET /shops/{shopID}/staffs.

lastName.description: Nom de famille du membre du personnel

telephone.description: Numéro de téléphone au format E.164

code.description: Code PIN à 4 chiffres du membre du personnel

isInit.description: Vrai si le compte a terminé sa configuration initiale

supertokensUsers.description: SuperTokens user UUIDs linked to this account

shopID.description: The shop this membership belongs to (mirrors path param)

name.description: Shop display name — NOT the staff member's name. Carries the salon's name as set in the shop document.

customSchedule.description: True when the staff has a schedule that differs from the shop default

onlineBooking.description: Whether this staff member is bookable online

showOnWebsite.description: Vrai si ce membre du personnel apparaît sur le site web du salon

allowedTypologies.description: Types de clientèle que ce membre peut prendre en charge (vide = aucune restriction)

StaffRef.description: Référence légère d'un membre du personnel intégrée dans les visites et articles — instantané du document personnel au moment de la réservation.

_id.description: MongoDB ObjectID du membre du personnel

firstName.description: Prénom du membre du personnel au moment de la réservation

lastName.description: Nom de famille du membre du personnel au moment de la réservation

PriceRef.description: Niveau tarifaire sélectionné pour un article dans une visite. Contient l'entrée Price choisie et un éventuel coefficient de partage.

name.description: Libellé du niveau tarifaire sélectionné (ex. : Adulte)

value.description: Montant facturé pour ce niveau tarifaire dans la devise du salon

mode.description: Payment mode — observed: CB (card), ESPECE (cash), CHEQUE, AVOIR (credit note)

VisitPayment.description: Payment record attached to a visit. Populated only when status=PAID; for APPOINTMENT the details array is empty.

totalAccounting.description: Accounting total (may differ from total after discounts)

printTicket.description: Vrai si un ticket de caisse papier a été imprimé

sendTicket.description: Vrai si le ticket a été envoyé par e-mail au client

details.description: One entry per payment line (e.g. split CB + cash)

VisitAppointment.description: Appointment metadata embedded in a visit.

staffID.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the assigned staff member

day.description: YYYY-MM-DD (present only when explicitly set; rare)

duration.description: Total duration in minutes (sum of all items)

noShow.description: True when client did not show up

noShowFeePercentage.description: Percentage of the visit total charged as no-show fee (0–100)

isTransparentPaymentAvailable.description: True when the client has a saved payment method (Stripe) enabling no-show fee capture

source.description: Booking origin — observed: online-booking, backoffice, treatwell, rwg

takenAt.description: When the appointment was booked (may be absent for walk-ins)

fromPartner.description: Partner identifier when booked via a third-party (e.g. Treatwell)

orderReference.description: External order reference (e.g. Treatwell order ID)

VisitItem.description: Item (service or package) as embedded in a visit. Extends the Item schema with visit-specific fields: the selected price tier, assigned staff snapshot, discounts, and for packages an items[] array of embedded sub-services.

_id.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the Item catalogue document

__v.description: Clé de version du document Mongoose

itemType.description: Type d'article : service, product (produit) ou package (forfait)

shortTitle.description: Libellé abrégé pour les vues compactes

titleRwG.description: Titre de remplacement pour l'intégration Google Reserve with Google

color.description: Named colour for the item on the planning board — observed values: purple, cherry, orange, blue, green, pink, yellow, red. null means no colour assigned.

taxRate.description: Taux de TVA applicable à cet article en pourcentage

whateverStaff.description: True when any available staff can perform this item (no specific assignment)

isGiftCard.description: Vrai si cet article est une carte cadeau

paid.description: Whether this individual item has been paid

bookingReference.description: External booking reference (e.g. Treatwell reference for this item)

price.description: Selected price tier for this visit

allowedTypes.description: Types de clientèle autorisés pour cet article (vide = aucune restriction)

tags.description: Étiquettes libres associées à l'article

picturesCPID.description: Chemins Cloudinary des photos de l'article

products.description: ObjectIDs des produits consommés lors de la réalisation de ce service

items.description: Sous-services pour les articles de type forfait — VisitItems récursifs sans leur propre tableau items[]

onlineBooking.description: Réservable via le widget de réservation en ligne Wavy

onlineBookingRwg.description: Réservable via Google Reserve with Google

showOnWebsite.description: Affiché sur le site web / widget de réservation en ligne

updatedAt.description: Date de dernière modification de l'article (ISO 8601)

Visit.description: A visit record — represents a booked, paid, or cancelled appointment. Embedded client and item documents are snapshots at the time the visit was created/updated.

shopID.description: Identifiant UUID du salon auquel appartient cette visite

status.description: Statut de la visite : APPOINTMENT = rendez-vous confirmé non payé, PAID = visite payée, CANCELED = annulée

client.description: Embedded client snapshot. Includes stats when populated.

updates.description: Audit log of modifications to this visit (structure TBD)

lastUpdate.description: Timestamp of the last modification (present only when updates is non-empty)

linkedVisitIds.description: ObjectIDs of related visits (e.g. multi-staff or split appointments)

recurringTemplateID.description: ObjectID of the RecurringVisit template if this visit was generated by a recurring series

RecurringVisit.description: A future occurrence of a recurring appointment template. Not a persisted Visit document — generated on-the-fly from the template for the requested date range.

templateID.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the recurring template

client.description: Minimal client reference — only identity fields, no stats or payment data

PlanningDay.description: All planning data for a single calendar day in a shop.

visits.description: Confirmed, paid, and cancelled visits for this day

recurringVisits.description: Future occurrences generated from recurring templates

leaves.description: Staff leave / shop closure periods overlapping this day

ItemColor.description: Lightweight colour assignment for an item — only the fields needed to render the planning board.

_id.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the Item catalogue document

color.description: Named planning-board colour — observed: purple, cherry, orange, blue, green, pink, yellow, red. null when no colour is assigned.

PaginatedClientsResponse.description: Paginated client list as returned by the Core microservice.

rows.description: Client documents for this page. Heavy optional fields (notes, address, birthdate, google, progressiveJackpot) are omitted in the list projection; stats contains only lastVisitIsNoShow unless enriched.

total.description: Total number of clients matching the query

CreditUsageEntry.description: Un événement de déduction dans l'historique d'utilisation d'un crédit.

Credit.description: A loyalty credit balance earned by a client from a specific visit. Created automatically when a visit is paid. amountRemaining decreases each time the credit is redeemed.

clientID.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the client who earned this credit

loyaltyID.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the LoyaltyProgram that generated this credit

loyaltyType.description: Programme type — matches the `type` field of the corresponding LoyaltyProgramme definition

visitID.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the visit that generated this credit

amountOriginal.description: Credit amount at creation time (in currency). Note: percent-based jackpots are already converted to a currency amount here.

amountRemaining.description: Remaining usable credit. Decremented each time a CreditUsage is recorded.

currency.description: Code devise ISO 4217 du crédit (ex. : EUR)

unit.description: Always currency — percent jackpots are converted to a monetary amount at creation time

expireAt.description: Expiry timestamp. Absent when the program has expireInDays=0 (never expires).

usageHistory.description: Log of redemptions. Empty until the credit is first used.

LoyaltyProgram.description: A loyalty program definition for a shop. Two types: jackpot (cashback percentage earned per visit) and giftCard (fixed-value credit sold or given).

__v.description: Clé de version du document Mongoose

shopID.description: Identifiant UUID du salon auquel appartient ce programme

name.description: Nom affiché du programme de fidélité

type.description: jackpot = cashback earned on every paid visit; giftCard = prepaid credit card

unit.description: percent = value is a cashback percentage; absolute = value is a fixed currency amount

value.description: Program value. Interpretation depends on unit: 3 with unit=percent means 3% cashback; 39 with unit=absolute means a €39 gift card.

allowedTypes.description: Item types eligible for this program. A jackpot with allowedTypes=[service,package] does not accumulate on product sales.

expireInDays.description: Number of days before a credit earned from this program expires. 0 means credits never expire.

deleted.description: Soft-delete flag — filter with deleted[$ne]=true to exclude

CreditUsage.description: A record of partial or full consumption of a Credit.

visitID.description: Visit where the credit was redeemed

LoyaltyProgramme.description: Définition d'un programme de fidélité. Chaque salon en possède généralement 2 à 5. Les enregistrements Credit référencent ces programmes via loyaltyID.

__v.description: Clé de version du document Mongoose

shopID.description: Identifiant UUID du salon auquel appartient ce programme

type.description: jackpot = progressive cashback accumulation; giftCard = fixed-value gift card

unit.description: How the credit value is calculated: percent of spend, or a fixed absolute amount

value.description: The rate (when unit=percent) or face value (when unit=absolute)

expireInDays.description: Credits issued under this programme expire after this many days. 0 means no expiry.

allowedTypes.description: Item types that can earn or redeem this credit. Known values: service, product, package.

TreatwellEmployeeRating.description: Note attribuée à un membre du personnel dans un avis Treatwell.

employeeId.description: MongoDB ObjectID du membre du personnel évalué

TreatwellItemRating.description: Note attribuée à un service dans un avis Treatwell.

title.description: Intitulé du service tel qu'il apparaissait lors de la réservation Treatwell

TreatwellVenueRating.description: Note attribuée à un critère de l'établissement dans un avis Treatwell.

type.description: Critère évalué : AMBIANCE = ambiance, CLEANLINESS = propreté, VALUE_FOR_MONEY = rapport qualité-prix, STAFF = personnel

TreatwellReview.description: A Treatwell customer review synced into the Wavy platform. `_id` is the Treatwell-assigned numeric review ID (stored as string). Ratings are granular: per staff member, per service booked, and per venue attribute.

visitID.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the matching Wavy visit

active.description: Whether the review is publicly visible on Treatwell

reviewerName.description: First name of the reviewer as provided by Treatwell

venueRatings.description: Per-venue-attribute ratings. Observed types: AMBIANCE, CLEANLINESS

updatedAt.description: Date de dernière modification de l'avis (ISO 8601)

TreatwellReviewStats.description: Aggregate review statistics for the shop

Invoice.description: A Wavy platform subscription invoice issued by Zuora.

amount.description: Invoice total in the shop's billing currency

VisitStaffRef.description: Embedded staff reference — name snapshot at visit time

_id.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the staff user

VisitAppointment.description: Appointment metadata. Present on every visit (even walk-ins where source is absent).

staffID.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the assigned staff

source.description: Booking origin. Absent on walk-in visits.

fromPartner.description: Sub-channel qualifier. Present when source=online-booking but the booking actually originated from a partner (e.g. 'reserve-with-google'). Allows distinguishing RwG traffic that flows through the Wavy widget.

noShowFeePercentage.description: No-show fee as a % of total (0–100)

VisitPaymentDetail.description: One payment line — a single tender in a split-payment scenario

mode.description: Payment mode, e.g. CB, cash, cheque

VisitPayment.description: Payment record. Populated once the visit reaches PAID status.

totalAccounting.description: Accounting total (may differ from total after discounts)

email.description: Email used to send the receipt

details.description: One entry per payment tender (multiple on split payments)

VisitLineItem.description: A service or product line within a visit. Extends the catalog Item with booking-specific fields. itemType can be 'service', 'product', or 'package' (a bundle of services).

_id.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the catalog item

price.description: The selected price tier for this visit

coeff.description: Revenue-split coefficient for sub-items inside a package (sub-item price / package total)

whateverStaff.description: True when any staff member can perform this service

paid.description: Whether this line item has been paid

serviceID.description: Reference to the underlying service (present on package sub-items)

bookingReference.description: External booking reference (e.g. Treatwell booking ID)

Visit.description: A full visit record, embedding a client snapshot, appointment metadata, payment, and line items.

status.description: APPOINTMENT = upcoming, PENDING = in-chair, PAID = completed, CANCELED = cancelled

linkedVisitIds.description: IDs of related visits (e.g. split visits)

recurringTemplateID.description: If created from a recurring template

periodClosure.description: Reference to the daily cash closure this visit belongs to (schema TBD)

ClosureAmount.description: Per-payment-method total for a daily closure

mode.description: Payment method code. Observed: CASH, CHECK, GIFT, OTHER, CB (card), TW (Twint/wallet), TP (third-party)

total.description: Total amount collected via this mode

ClosureClosedBy.description: Staff member who validated the end-of-day closure

_id.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the staff user

status.description: OPEN while day is in progress; CLOSED after end-of-day validation

amounts.description: Payment-method breakdown. Present on all records; values are 0 until day is active.

closedAt.description: Only present when status is CLOSED

closedBy.description: Only present when status is CLOSED

cashBalance.description: Cumulative physical cash balance at time of closure. Only present when status is CLOSED.

ClosureRow.description: A closure wrapped with its editability flag

isEditable.description: False for closures older than the editable window (roughly 3 weeks)

total.description: Total number of closure records across all pages

TargetingTemplate.description: Global (Wavy-defined) SMS automation workflow template. Not shop-specific.

watch.description: Client metric to watch. Observed: client.visitsCount, client.daysToBirthday, client.monthsSinceLastVisit

threshold.description: Value to compare against (e.g. 1 for first visit, 0 for birthday day)

repeating.description: Whether the rule fires every time the condition is met (true) or only once (false)

TargetingRule.description: Shop-specific SMS automation rule, derived from a TargetingTemplate.

targetingTemplateId.description: MongoDB ObjectID referencing the parent TargetingTemplate

countriesBlacklist.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes to exclude from sending

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile and their shop memberships. Path uses the /v2/auth/v1/ prefix — the SuperTokens-backed auth microservice. The rid: anti-csrf header is required by SuperTokens CSRF protection.

Returns an array containing the full shop document for the session's salon. Supports FeathersJS-style field projection via $select (space-separated dot-notation paths), but in practice the server returns all fields regardless — $select appears advisory only.

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: FeathersJS field projection. URL-encode spaces as %20. Dot-notation for nested fields.

304.description: Not Modified — returned when If-None-Match ETag matches

get.description: Returns a single shop document by UUID. Without extra params the body is identical to GET /shops (minus the array wrapper). Pass populateStaff=true to embed a users[] array of fully-hydrated staff profiles.

parameters.name: populateStaff
parameters.description: When true, adds a users[] field with full staff profiles

200.description: Single shop document with optional users[] injection

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all shops the authenticated user belongs to. Serves the same full shop document as GET /shops but wrapped in a pagination envelope and routed through the auth microservice.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Items per page (default appears to be 20)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort by, e.g. name

get.summary: List all clients for a shop
get.description: Returns the complete client list for a shop in a single (unpaginated) array. For a salon with ~5,500 clients the response is ~2.4 MB — the server supports If-None-Match / 304. Pass withVisitData=1 to populate the stats object (totalSpent, ticketAverage, visitNb, lastVisitDate, lastVisitIsNoShow) on each client. Stats are absent from records with no visits.

parameters.name: shopID
parameters.description: Mirrors the path param — redundant but sent by the official client

parameters.name: withVisitData
parameters.description: When 1, populates stats.totalSpent, stats.ticketAverage, stats.lastVisitDate, stats.visitNb

get.description: Returns a single client document by ObjectID. The response is a projected subset of the full Client schema — heavy optional fields (notes, address, birthdate, stripe, facebook, google) are omitted, while stats includes the full ClientStats object (totalSpent, ticketAverage, lastVisitDate, visitNb, lastVisitIsNoShow).

200.description: Projected client document with full stats

get.summary: List items (services / products / packages) for a shop
get.description: Returns all items belonging to a shop. itemType can be 'service', 'product', or 'package'. Packages embed their component services inline with package-adjusted pricing (PackageItem with a `price.coeff` field). Supports FeathersJS Mongo-style operators — e.g. type[$ne]=gift-card, type[$in][]=haircut. The shopID query param mirrors the path param (redundant but sent by the official client). Supports ETag / 304.

parameters.name: shopID
parameters.description: Mirrors the path param — redundant but expected by the server

parameters.name: itemType
parameters.description: Filters by item class. package returns bundle items with embedded service objects.

parameters.name: type[$ne]
parameters.description: FeathersJS $ne operator — exclude a specific type value

parameters.name: type[$in][]
parameters.description: FeathersJS $in operator — include only listed type values

get.description: Returns an array of online-booking widget configuration documents matching a MongoDB-style query. The query parameter is a URL-encoded JSON object supporting Mongo operators such as $in. Internally this is a Moleculer service action — errors surface as MoleculerError JSON.

get.summary: List staff leaves (time-off / absences) for a shop
get.description: Returns all staff leave and absence records for the shop as a flat, unpaginated array. In production this returns 480+ records. Each leave has a type ('staff'), a date range, an optional cause string, and an embedded partial staff user reference. The response is large — supports ETag / 304 caching. The if-none-match header will produce a 304 (no body) when the ETag matches.

parameters.name: shopID
parameters.description: Mirrors the path param — redundant but sent by the official client

304.description: Not Modified — ETag matched (if-none-match header was provided)

401.description: Authentication failed — token expired or invalid

get.summary: List background tasks for a shop
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of background tasks for a specific shop, sorted by a given field. Includes SMS billing job statuses and progress tracking.

parameters.name: shopID
parameters.description: The UUID of the shop to filter tasks by

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of tasks to return per page

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field with direction (prefix with - for descending). Example: -updatedAt for newest first.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing authentication tokens

get.description: Returns the complete global brand catalogue as a flat, unpaginated array. Not scoped to a shop — any valid session token works. The response is large (~450 KB, 3 550+ entries as of 2026-04). Supports ETag / 304 caching.
Returns all discount definitions for the shop as a flat array. Discounts can be absolute (fixed currency amount) or percentage. The applicableTo array is empty when the discount applies to all items.

get.summary: List loyalty credits for a client
get.description: Returns all loyalty credit balances earned by a client. Filter by clientID to get a specific client's credits. Credits are created automatically when a visit is paid and reference the LoyaltyProgram that generated them.

parameters.name: clientID
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectID of the client whose credits to fetch

parameters.name: deleted[$ne]
parameters.description: Pass true to exclude soft-deleted credits

get.summary: List loyalty programs for a shop
get.description: Returns all loyalty program definitions for a shop as a flat array. Use deleted[$ne]=true to exclude soft-deleted programs (standard usage). Supports ETag / 304 caching.

parameters.name: deleted[$ne]
parameters.description: Pass true to exclude soft-deleted programs

get.summary: List all staff users for the session shop
get.description: Returns all staff user documents belonging to the authenticated session's shop. Each user includes their schedule, shop role, SuperTokens identity links, and login policy stats.
Returns the Treatwell marketplace integration document for a shop. Includes sync status, listing URL, marketplace venue ID, and modal/welcome-kit interaction history.

401.description: Unauthorized — session expired or MoleculerError TRY_REFRESH_TOKEN

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of Treatwell customer reviews synced into Wavy. Supports `pageSize` and `sort` (prefix with `-` for descending, e.g. `-createdAt`). Routes through the `/v2/treatwell/{shopID}/v1/` Moleculer microservice.

`_id` is the Treatwell numeric review ID, not a MongoDB ObjectID. Reviews include granular ratings per staff member, per service, and per venue attribute (AMBIANCE, CLEANLINESS).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending (e.g. -createdAt)

get.description: Returns the total review count and average overall rating for the shop. Lightweight summary endpoint — no pagination.

get.summary: Get a single Treatwell review by ID
get.description: Returns a single Treatwell review by its Treatwell-assigned numeric ID. Response shape is identical to a row from the list endpoint.

get.summary: List SMS campaigns for a shop
get.description: Returns a paginated list of SMS marketing campaigns for the shop. Each campaign includes targeting filters, recipient lists, message content, billing price, and an embedded ROI summary. Routes through the /v2/marketing Moleculer microservice.

rows.title: Brunch
rows.message: Voici votre lien pour le brunch.

get.summary: Get ROI metrics for an SMS campaign
get.description: Returns the return-on-investment metrics for a specific SMS campaign. The measurement window closes after a set period post-send (closed=true). Revenue attribution links visits to campaign recipients.

post.description: Triggers an async statistics export for one or more shops over a date range. Returns immediately — the export is processed in the background. The filename and shopname fields are metadata for the generated file. Token expiry causes 401 not-authenticated.

requestID.description: Client-generated UUID to track this export request

filename.description: Display name for the generated export file

example.filename: Fichier de statistiques FratelliCut® 01 April 2026 à 30 April 2026

schema.description: Export job confirmation (schema TBD — returned 401 during testing due to token expiry)

post.summary: Sign in with email and password
post.description: SuperTokens email+password sign-in endpoint. On success, sets the three session cookies (sAccessToken, sRefreshToken, sIdRefreshToken) and returns the SuperTokens user record. No prior authentication required — this is the entry point for the session lifecycle.

200.description: Always HTTP 200. Check `status` in the body: `OK` means success (cookies set); `WRONG_CREDENTIALS_ERROR` means bad email/password (no cookies set).

Set-Cookie.description: sAccessToken, sRefreshToken, sIdRefreshToken cookies — only present when status is OK

user.description: Minimal SuperTokens user record. Call GET /v2/auth/v1/users/me for the full Wavy profile.

post.description: SuperTokens session refresh endpoint. Requires the sRefreshToken cookie. On success, rotates all three session cookies (sAccessToken, sRefreshToken, sIdRefreshToken) and returns the new id-refresh-token in the response headers. On failure (expired or already-consumed refresh token), returns 401 with 'token theft detected' and clears all session cookies. The rid header must be 'session' (not 'anti-csrf').

parameters.name: rid
parameters.description: Must be 'session' (differs from other endpoints which require 'anti-csrf')

200.description: Tokens rotated. New sAccessToken, sRefreshToken, sIdRefreshToken set via Set-Cookie. id-refresh-token returned in response header.

401.description: Refresh token expired or already consumed. Response body: {"message":"token theft detected"}. All session cookies are cleared.

get.description: Returns the global preset catalogue of SMS automation workflow templates. These are Wavy-defined templates (not shop-specific) that shops use as a starting point when configuring their own automation rules. Path uses /v2/marketing/v1/ without a shopID — not scoped to a shop.

200.description: Paginated list of global SMS templates

rows.description: Un message envoyé au client après sa première visite
rows.message: Merci pour votre visite {{client.firstName}} ! L'équipe de {{shop.name}} est heureuse de vous compter parmi ses clients. A très vite
rows.name: Première visite

get.description: Returns the shop's configured SMS automation rules. Each rule is derived from a global template (linked via targetingTemplateId) and customised per-shop. Rules fire based on watch/trigger/threshold logic (e.g. client.visitsCount == 1). Rules can be enabled/disabled individually.

200.description: Paginated list of shop-specific SMS rules

rows.description: Un message envoyé au client pour son anniversaire
rows.message: {{client.firstName}}, l'équipe de {{shop.name}} vous souhaite un joyeux anniversaire, en toute beauté ! Belle journée
rows.name: Bon anniversaire

get.description: Retrieves Facebook Business Extension configuration for a specific shop. Routes through Moleculer marketing microservice (/v2/marketing prefix).

schema.description: FBE configuration object (structure not yet fully documented)

get.summary: List active staff for a shop (flattened membership view)
get.description: Returns all active staff members for a shop with their shop-specific membership fields (role, schedule, onlineBooking, etc.) flattened directly onto each document. Unlike GET /users — which nests memberships in a shops[] array — this endpoint embeds the active shop context directly. Supports FeathersJS Mongo-style query operators (e.g. deleted[$ne]=true to exclude soft-deleted staff).

parameters.name: deleted[$ne]
parameters.description: FeathersJS $ne operator — pass true to exclude soft-deleted staff (standard usage)

200.description: Array of staff member documents with flattened membership fields

get.summary: Get planning days for a date range
get.description: Returns one PlanningDay object per calendar day in the requested range. Each day contains visits (confirmed/paid/cancelled appointments with full embedded client, item, and payment data), recurring visit occurrences projected from templates, and leaves. Routes through the /v2/planning/{shopID}/v1/ Moleculer microservice.

200.description: Array of PlanningDay objects, one per calendar day in the requested range

401.description: Unauthorized — session expired or token invalid

get.summary: List visits for a shop (filterable by client)
get.description: Returns an unpaginated array of Visit documents for a shop. Primarily used to fetch the full visit history for a specific client using the FeathersJS dot-notation filter `client._id`. Sorting uses the `$sort[field]=-1` FeathersJS operator. The embedded client object is a minimal reference (identity fields only — no stripe, no full stats).

parameters.name: deleted[$ne]
parameters.description: Pass true to exclude soft-deleted visits

parameters.name: client._id
parameters.description: FeathersJS dot-notation filter — MongoDB ObjectID of the client to fetch visits for

get.summary: List visits for a time period
get.description:
Returns all visits (appointments, in-progress, paid, and cancelled) whose appointment date falls within the [from, to] range. The URL uses the /v2/core/{shopID}/v1/ Moleculer microservice prefix — note the shop UUID is embedded in the path, not as a query param.

The response embeds: full client snapshot (with stats), appointment metadata (staff, source, no-show flag), payment record (mode, details, totals), and enriched line items (catalog data + booking-specific fields like assigned staff, selected price tier, and discounts).

This endpoint is called from app.wavy.co (not backoffice.wavy.fr) and sends a set of `device-*` headers used for client telemetry.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of the period (inclusive). ISO 8601, typically 22:00 UTC of the previous calendar day to account for Europe/Paris timezone.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of the period (inclusive). ISO 8601, typically 21:59:59.999 UTC of the target calendar day.

parameters.name: device-timezone
parameters.description: IANA timezone of the client (e.g. Europe/Paris)

200.description: Array of visit records for the period

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all daily closure records for a shop, newest first. Each row wraps the Closure document with an isEditable flag (false once the record is outside the editable window, roughly 3 weeks). Total observed: 1 379 records going back years. Requires device-* headers (sent by app.wavy.co).

get.summary: Get a single closure by ID
get.description: Returns a single daily closure record wrapped in a ClosureRow. The closureId follows the composite-key format {YYYY-MM-DD}-{shopUUID}.
Returns the current physical cash balance as a plain number (not JSON-wrapped). This is the cumulative cash-drawer balance used when closing a daily record.

200.description: Current cash balance as a plain number

get.description: Returns the current day's cash register closure record for the shop. Created automatically at day start with status OPEN. Transitions to CLOSED after end-of-day validation, at which point amounts is populated with the payment-method breakdown. Path follows Moleculer pattern: /v2/finances/{shopID}/v1/.

day.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) for which this closure applies

status.description: OPEN while the day is in progress; CLOSED after end-of-day validation

amounts.description: Payment-method breakdown populated when CLOSED; empty array while OPEN

items.description: Per-payment-method total (schema TBD — not yet observed in a CLOSED closure)

get.description:
Returns all Wavy subscription invoices for the shop as a flat unpaginated array. Invoices are issued by Zuora (Wavy's billing provider). Routes through the `/v2/billing/{shopID}/v1/` Moleculer microservice.

Called from `app.wavy.co` settings → invoices screen.

Returns a pre-signed AWS S3 URL for downloading the invoice PDF. The response body is a bare JSON string (not an object). The URL expires after **3600 seconds** (1 hour) and points to `wavy-invoices-prod.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/{shopID}/{provider}/{invoiceID}.pdf`.

Path segments `{provider}` and `{invoiceID}` map directly to `Invoice.provider` and `Invoice.id` from the list endpoint.

parameters.name: invoiceID
parameters.description: Zuora invoice ID — the `id` field from the invoice list (hex string)

200.description: Pre-signed S3 URL for the invoice PDF (bare JSON string, expires in 3600 s)

get.summary: Get colour assignments for all items
get.description: Returns a minimal projection of every item in the shop containing only _id and color. Used by the planning board to colour-code appointments without fetching full item documents. Routes through the /v2/core/{shopID}/v1/ Moleculer microservice.

Returns a paginated list of clients for a shop. Complements the unpaginated GET /shops/{shopID}/clients — use this endpoint when you need sorted, page-by-page access rather than a full dump. The response is a subset projection of the Client document (heavy fields like notes, address, birthdate are absent). Routes through the /v2/core/{shopID}/v1/ Moleculer microservice.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending (e.g. -createdAt). Observed values: lastName, createdAt, updatedAt.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search across firstName, lastName, email, telephone (behaviour inferred — not yet confirmed)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of retail products for the shop, sorted and filtered via query params. Uses Moleculer microservice at /v2/stock/{shopID}/v1/. The sort param uses MongoDB-style prefix: -updatedAt for descending.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field with optional - prefix for descending (e.g. -updatedAt)

200.description: Paginated product list (schema TBD — endpoint returned 401 during testing due to token expiry)

taxRate.description: VAT rate as a percentage (e.g. 20 for 20%)

computedStock.description: Current stock level; can be negative if stock went below zero

showOnApp.description: Whether the product is visible in the online booking app

401.description: Unauthorized — session expired or token invalid

get.description: Returns the full record for a single retail product by its MongoDB ObjectID. Includes computed stock level, barcode, pricing, and tax rate.

taxRate.description: VAT rate as a percentage (e.g. 20 for 20%)

computedStock.description: Current stock level; can be negative if stock went below zero

showOnApp.description: Whether the product is visible in the online booking app

401.description: Unauthorized — session expired or token invalid

get.summary: Get past purchase prices by barcode
get.description: Returns the chronological list of purchase prices (cost prices, not retail) recorded for a product identified by barcode. Used to pre-fill the purchase price field when creating a new stock-in (stockIO). Returns an empty array if the product has never been purchased.

200.description: Array of past purchase price records, ordered chronologically. Empty array if no purchase history.

at.description: Timestamp when this purchase price was recorded

price.description: Purchase (cost) price in euros excl. VAT

401.description: Unauthorized — session expired or token invalid
